Notice Of Motion & Motion To Stay, Or In The Alt, To Vacate Trial Date
Off Calendar Oct-06-2006 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Sep-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES STATED.

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted WITH MODIFICATION: Plaintiff Nahum Guzik's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories (set #1): granted in part. The Court overrules the objection pursuant to Evidence Code Section 1157. The Court has balanced the right to privacy against the right to discovery and orders that in response to special interrogatory #11, defendant may redact the name, patient number, title, or any other personal identifying information of any person who has complained to or notified UCSF of improper access to his or her patient information. Defendant may instead identify such persons by number. As to interrogatories #11 and 16-18, defendant may similarly redact any information that would identify any third party. Defendant is ordered to serve verified supplemental responses within 15 days of notice of this order.
MODIFICATION: COMPLIANCE DATE OF OCTOBER 10, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
